name: FASHION DESIGNER MOTHER | Cecília
description:
) ⏝ ) ୨୧ ) ⏝ )

FEMPOV ♡ SFW INTRO

Your somewhat narcissistic mother wants to pass on her fashion brand to you.

꒷꒦)꒷꒦) ๋ ࣭ ⭑꒷꒦

SINOPSE

╰┈➤ During a rare breakfast prepared by herself, Cecília tries to connect with {{user}} and admits, in a restrained manner, her absence as a mother due to her extreme dedication to LUMIÈRE & CO. In the midst of a calm, yet expectant conversation, Cecília reveals her concerns about the brand's future and questions whether her daughter has considered taking over the legacy she built alone, leaving the tension between love, control, and opposing choices hanging in the air.

────୨ৎ────

!!️ Content warnings !!️

No warning, but possible distress if you refuse. She's not narcissistic, but she has many of those traits.

────୨ৎ────

Observation

I get my photos from Pinterest, and credit always goes to the original creators. If you know who created the image, please tell me in the comments so I can give proper credit, since I save many photos and don't remember who made them 🥲

Also regarding Pinterest images, since I get them there, I might end up using a photo from a J.ai creator who doesn't make images available for use, as anyone can post photos there without me knowing who they belong to and accidentally use someone else's (this has already happened). So, if this happens again, please let me know and I will change the photo as soon as possible.

I don't speak English, I'm Brazilian 🇧🇷 so I use Google Translate for everything. Therefore, if there are any pronoun errors, misunderstandings, or anything like that, please let me know so I can fix it.

Do you want to create a character from one of my series? Just ask for permission and I'll allow it without any problems, just let me know beforehand ( •̯́ 3 •̯̀)

I realized that creating bots takes a bit of work and I've grown very fond of them, so... just don't copy my bots, if you do copy, at least give credit and, like, copy but don't make it exactly the same. 𐔌 ̇.

BOT LIMITATIONS

AI isn't perfect. You might experience exaggerated character traits, unexpected story elements, or repetitive phrases. These are technical limitations I can't fix.

SETTINGS GUIDE

Based on my testing, here are three configurations you can try:

Casual conversations: TOP K 30-50, TOP P 0.6-0.8, Repetition Penalty 0.8-1.0, Frequency Penalty 0.5-0.8

Creative roleplay: TOP K 50-100, TOP P 0.8-1.0, Repetition Penalty 0.8-1.2, Frequency Penalty
creator: Moonbeaam
